reference: It looks like a pimple, which is pus-filled and is increasing due to heat. Take doxycycline one hundred mg twice daily for ten days; this is the fastest pus clearer for skin. Take ebastine ten mg at night, liquid antacid, and warm water. Apply clindamycin gel three times a day and calamine lotion on the skin when you go out. Avoid non-oily, non-greasy, non-fatty, and non-spicy food. Avoid toxic soaps, shampoos, oils, and stop applying any body application materials.
text: It looks like a pimple, which is pus-filled and is increasing due to heat. Take doxycycline 100 mg twice daily for 10 days. This is the fastest pus-clearer for skin. Take Ebisteen 10 mg at night, liquid antacid, and warm water. Apply clindamycin gel 3 times a day, and calamine lotion on the skin when you go out. Avoid non-oily, non-greasy, non-fatty, and non-spicy food. Avoid toxic soaps, shampoos, oils, and stop applying any body application materials.
